subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest in praise of the True One and art the melodious nightingale singing His truth, upon thee rest the glory of God and His praise, His light and His radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای حق و بلبل گویای حق علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و نوره و ضیائه در
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @humility; meekness; lowliness
